gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (425/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (425/ 9)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بَعَثَ نَبِيّاً مِنْ أَنْبِيَائِهِ إِلَى قَوْمِهِ وَ أَوْحَى إِلَيْهِ أَنْ قُلْ لِقَوْمِكَ إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ مِنْ أَهْلِ قَرْيَةٍ وَ لَا أُنَاسٍ كَانُوا عَلَى طَاعَتِي فَأَصَابَهُمْ فِيهَا سَرَّاءُ فَتَحَوَّلُوا عَمَّا أُحِبُّ إِلَى مَا أَكْرَهُ إِلَّا تَحَوَّلْتُ لَهُمْ عَمَّا يُحِبُّونَ إِلَى مَا يَكْرَهُونَ

وَ لَيْسَ مِنْ أَهْلِ قَرْيَةٍ وَ لَا أَهْلِ بَيْتٍ كَانُوا عَلَى مَعْصِيَتِي فَأَصَابَهُمْ فِيهَا ضَرَّاءُ فَتَحَوَّلُوا عَمَّا أَكْرَهُ إِلَى مَا أُحِبُّ إِلَّا تَحَوَّلْتُ لَهُمْ عَمَّا يَكْرَهُونَ إِلَى مَا يُحِبُّونَ
وَ قُلْ لَهُمْ إِنَّ رَحْمَتِي سَبَقَتْ غَضَبِي فَلَا تَقْنَطُوا مِنْ رَحْمَتِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَتَعَاظَمُ عِنْدِي ذَنْبٌ أَغْفِرُهُ
وَ قُلْ لَهُمْ لَا يَتَعَرَّضُوا مُعَانِدِينَ لِسَخَطِي وَ لَا يَسْتَخِفُّوا بِأَوْلِيَائِي فَإِنَّ لِي سَطَوَاتٍ عِنْدَ غَضَبِي لَا يَقُومُ لَهَا شَيْ‏ءٌ مِنْ خَلْقِي .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, altogether from Ibn Mahboub, from Al haysam Bin Waqad Al Jazry who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> saying: ‘Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Sent a Prophet<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> from His<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Prophets<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> to his<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> people and Revealed unto him<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup>: “Say to your<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> people: ‘There are none from the inhabitants of a town nor a people who used to be upon My<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> obedience and they attained happiness therein, so they changed over from what I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Love to what I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Dislike, except that I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Changed over for them from what they were loving to what they were dislking.

And there are none from a people of a town nor a family who used to be upon My<sup>azwj</sup> disobedience, so they were hit by harm therein, So they changed over from what I<sup>azwj</sup> Dislike to what I<sup>azwj</sup> Love, except that I<sup>azwj</sup> Changed for them from what they were disliking to what they were loving’.

And say to them: ‘My<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Precedes My<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Anger, therefore do not despair from My Mercy, so there is no sins greater in My<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Presence which I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Forgive’.

And say to them: ‘They should not expose themselves stubbornly to My<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Anger, nor belittle My<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Guardians<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, for Me<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> there are such Assaults during My<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Anger that nothing from My<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> creation can withstand it”.
en.sarwar: 25. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad fand Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father all from ibn Mahbub from al-Haytham ibn Waqid al-Jazari who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, sent a prophet to his people and inspired him to tell his people that the Lord says, ‘There has not been any inhabitants of a town or people who obeyed Me and lived happily and then changed from the condition that 1 loved to what I disliked, but that 1 also changed their condition from what they liked to what they disliked. There has not been any inhabitant of a town or a house who disobeyed Me and were suffering hardships. They then changed their condition from what I disliked to what I loved, I also then changed their condition from what they disliked to what they loved. Tell them that My favors come before My anger. Do not despair of receiving My favors; sins are not much greater to Me to forgive. Tell them not to subject themselves stubbornly to My anger and do not consider My friends insignificant; when angry. My striking is insurmountable and no one of the creatures can withstand it.’”
